2026-03-30IRCC, TBFinancial Administration ActFee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Certain Foreign Nationals) Remission OrderFee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Certain Foreign Nationals) Remission Order in order to remit the fee that was waived for eligible principal applicants and their accompanying family members whose applications were approved under a temporary public policy.N/A
subject: Fee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Certain Foreign Nationals) Remission Order
precis: Fee Paid or Payable for the Acquisition of Permanent Resident Status (Certain Foreign Nationals) Remission Order in order to remit the fee that was waived for eligible principal applicants and their accompanying family members whose applications were approved under a temporary public policy.
